tokens.text: charges up held items before using

fields.title: Items
fields.description: The list of items that can be used to charge the held item. This list is required and must have at least one item in it.

fields.title: Priority
fields.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

description: Allows an entity to charge and use their held item.
title: Charge Held Item Behavior
